bugs.title: "When a blocked paid seller sends an inquiry or call on product card to a free seller who has blocked them, the blocked paid seller is able to make a call from the conversation screen."
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

"When a blocked paid seller sends an inquiry to a free seller who has blocked them, the blocked paid seller is able to make a call from the conversation screen."

### **Expected Behavior**

Blocked paid seller should not be able to call to the seller who blocked them unless seller unblock the paid seller

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Login with any even glid free seller
2.  Connect app to test server
3.  Now go to the conversation screen of any paid seller
4.  block the user by clicking block option present on context menu
5.  Now login with paid seller blocked by free seller
6.  check no call now cta is shown on conversation screen
7.  Now send enquiry to the free seller from company page
8.  navigate back to the lms conversation screen
9.  check call now cta is shown and on clicking call now cta user is able to call to the free seller

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device: Realme 10 pro plus**
2.  **Environment**: Stage 
3.  **Operating System:** android 13

bugs.title: When seller sends a catalog link or product from whatsapp share icon in  conversation screen associated with catalog link & product from desktop ; Buyer on clicking that link is not redirecting to Mini catalog/Mini PDP in Android.
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

When seller sends a catalog link or product from whatsapp share icon in  conversation screen associated with catalog link & product from desktop; Buyer on clicking that link buyer is not redirecting to Mini catalog/Mini PDP in Android .

### **Expected Behavior**

Buyer should redirect to Mini Catalog & Mini PDP respectively.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Login with Paid seller in desktop
2.  Open a conversation screen of any buyer 
3.  Send catalog / product 
4.  Click on whatsapp icon below ctalog/product link
5.  Share it with that particular buyer in whatsapp web
6.  Now login with that buyer in Android app
7.  Click on the catalog / product link shared in whatsapp
8.  Observe user is not redirecting to mini catalog / mini pdp

bugs.title: Calling Upload Image API with wrong files and missing Params
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

*   we are getting hits at Upload Image API for uploading heic images with ".jpg"or".jpeg"  extension  , empty text files with ".pdf" or "jpeg" extension. 
*   Currently Upload Image API is being called without mandatory param "IMAGE\_TYPE"
*   API is being called with wrong AK , AK of different user and expired Token.

Above Behaviour is leading to 4k 4xx at UPLOAD IMAGE API in last 21 days.

### **Expected Behavior**

*   UPLOAD IMAGE API [(uploading.imimg.com](https://imkibanaindia.intermesh.net/app/r/s/XEKUC)) should be called for files with correct extension.
*   All mandatory input Params should be passed to the API.
*   Valid AK and correct AK should be passed to the API. 

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Desktop/Mobile
2.  **Environment**: Production:
3.  **Operating System:** e.g. Centos 7 / Ubuntu 20.04/ Windows 10 Pro
4.  **Browser/Version:** e.g. Google Chrome 89.0.4389.90 (64 bit)

### **Logs**

[Kibana Link](https://imkibanaindia.intermesh.net/app/r/s/XEKUC)

bugs.title: Receiving wrong page requests over elastic search causing 500
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

Please check the [kibana link](https://imkibanaindia.intermesh.net/app/r/s/oQlp2). Here a user is able to scroll 285, 286 and so on pages even though each page has 500 only. I wish to know how a user is able to scroll to next page when previous page never returned any relevant data. Ideally if not new contact is returned we mustnt send any more requests.

### **Expected Behavior**

The API should receive requests for those pages only till the last page has delivered some data for the contacts.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  From the API perspective
    1.  hit the api given in kibana link and you shall get the error.
2.  Not aware of how to make this from front end.

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Mobile
2.  **Environment**: Production
3.  **Operating System:** ANDROID
4.  **Browser/Version:** NA

### **Logs**

https://imkibanaindia.intermesh.net/app/r/s/oQlp2

All users that are using ANDROID Indiamart app should get this.

### **Bug Type**

Functional bug.

### **Bug Source**

Launch Bug.

Also for buylead screen (webview) only MDCsellerTools is visible with wrong Csl log value. ### **Expected Behavior** Csl logs should go as 4353 with correct name on app. ### **Steps to reproduce:** 1. Login as a paid seller. 2. Now navigate to BL listing. 3. Now click on contact now at BL card for indian BL. 4. At subscription plan click on any BL package. 5. Check CSL logs for the same. also Name for each screen is going as MDCviaSellerTools on buylead webview screen. ### **Test Environment**: 1. **Device:** Mobile 2. **Environment**: Stage 3. **Operating System:** Android 11
bugs.author: madhur Kumar

bugs.title: System generated message is not updating in real time on lms conversation screen, when buyer read the outbound message in whatsapp
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

System generated message is not updating in real time on lms conversation screen, when buyer read the outbound message in whatsapp.

Also sometime message sent from product template is not shown real time in conversation screen

### **Expected Behavior**

If buyer read outbound message in whatsapp then system generated message should be updated 

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  login as 1126577560 
2.  Send single or muliple product as outbound template 
3.  now read the outbound message in buyer whatsapp account 
4.  check the system generated message are not updating 
5.  Now send any message present on product template 
6.  check the 24 hours window opened shown in real time 
7.  Sometime message sent from product template is not shown real time in conversaiton screen.

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device: Motorola g32**
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** android 13

###
bugs.author: Shubham Panigrahi

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  **login as 7349419**
2.  **Now go to bl listing screen**
3.  **purchase any bl**
4.  click on product 
5.  send product on whatsapp through share icon
6.  navigate back to bl listing screen 
7.  click on view details 
8.  check the product shared is not shown in real time 
9.  navigate back to listing and open the same conversation again 
10.  all messages are shown 
11.  It replicated only once.

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Motorola g32
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** android 13

###

bugs.title: When the user clicks the 'Detect My City' CTA on Search filter CTA on Search, Impact, or PDP WebView pages, and the app has location permission but the device location is turned off, there is no prompt or guidance to enable device location.
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

When the user clicks the **'Detect My City'** CTA on **Search filter**, **Impact**, or **PDP** WebView pages, and the **app has location permission** but the **device location is turned off**, there is **no prompt or guidance** to enable device location.

### **Expected Behavior**

The app should **prompt the user to turn on device location** when they click the **'Near Me'** CTA under these conditions to ensure relevant nearby results..

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Login with Buyer
2.  Search any Product
3.  Allow location permission of app
4.  Turn off device location
5.  Click on detect my city cta from filter section
6.  Location is not getting updating or permission to turn on device location isn't shown

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Redmi note 9 pro max
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** Android 12

### **Actual Behavior**

Non IM Insta New filters are shown for IM insta seller for first time after login on LMS listing screen (intermittent)

This issue replicated after testing on same account for 2-3 hours.

Issue is not replicating after reinstalling the app and logged in with same account

Issue is replicated once

Similar issue raised / Ticket ID -597537 on s1 build and it is fixed in s2.

### **Expected Behavior**

IM insta filter should always display for IM insta seller on lms listing screen

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  login as 1126577560
2.  Test different functionality for 1-2 hours
3.  Relaunch the app 
4.  Non IM insta filters are shown for IM Insta users.

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** android 15

###
bugs.author: Shubham Panigrahi

bugs.title: Duplicate city suggestion  is displaying on city search page
bugs.description: ### **Actual Behavior** Duplicate city suggestion  is displaying on city search page  glid :-130356318 ### **Expected Behavior** no duplicate suggestion will display  ### **Steps to reproduce:** 1. ope android app  2. login with 130356318  3. search the product and check suggested cities  4. by selecting both filters same results are displaying  ### **Test Environment**: 1. **Device:** Android 2. **Environment**: Production: 3. **Operating System:** e.g. Centos 7 / Ubuntu 20.04/ Windows 10 Pro 4. **Browser/Version:** 13.4.9 ###
bugs.author: naveen althi

bugs.title: Ship with IM displaying for foreign users
bugs.description: ### **Actual Behavior** The "Ship with IndiaMART" feature is a logistics service available only to Indian buyers and suppliers. However, it is visible in the left menu for foreign buyers, who are not eligible to access or use this service. This creates confusion and a poor user experience for foreign users, as it implies availability of a service they cannot use. The option should be conditionally hidden based on the user’s country or buyer type. ### **Expected Behavior** The “Ship with IndiaMART” option should not be shown for foreign buyers. ### **Steps to reproduce:** 1. Launch the IndiaMART app. 2. Log in using a foreign buyer account. 3. Tap the hamburger (left) menu. 4. Check the Ship with IM option ### **Test Environment**: 1. **Device:** Oneplus 2. **Environment**: Stage 3. **Operating System:** android 14
bugs.author: Anjali Patel

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Launch the IndiaMART app.
2.  Log in as foreign user
3.  Go to the “My Profile”  screen.
4.  Observe the country field area

1.  **Device:** oneplus

3.  **Operating System:** Android 14

bugs.title: Two system-generated messages are shown in the conversation if the seller has already sent an outbound template and the buyer sends an enquiry to the seller instead of replying on WhatsApp.
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

Two system-generated messages are shown in the conversation if the seller has already sent an outbound template and the buyer sends an enquiry to the seller instead of replying on WhatsApp.

This issue is replicated 3 times.

### **Expected Behavior**

Only one system-generated messages should be shown in the conversation if the seller has already sent an outbound template and the buyer sends an enquiry to the seller instead of replying on WhatsApp.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  login as 1126577560 or any IM Insta seller
2.  Open conversation screen of buyer
3.  Now send normal outbound template
4.  Catalog link or Introduction message
5.  Read the message from buyer whatsapp account
6.  check the System generated message - "Buyer read your message, waiting for reply" shown twice

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System: android 15**

quest, Security Testing, Pagespeed Testing, User Journey Testing

4.  Click on coal filter
5.  Scroll down to want more BL section

2.  **Operating System:** Android 12

bugs.title: DB Insertion Failing in XMPP Message Tracking Due to Combined Message ID and Resource ID Length > 100
bugs.description:
**Background:**

In our **XMPP Message Tracking Project**, we track the status of messages using a unique identifier formed by combining the **message\_id** and the **receiver\_resourceid**. This helps us uniquely identify each message instance, especially when a single message is sent to multiple recipients on the same device.

  

**Actual Behaviour:**

A Combination of the length of the message ID + the receiver resource ID is greater than 100

**Expected Behaviour:**

A combination of the length message ID + receiver resource ID, previously coming in less than 100. 

  

### Problem

Recently, the **DB team reported** that entries are **failing to insert into the XMPP message tracking table** when the `message_id` (combined string) exceeds **100 characters**.

This is impacting our message tracking accuracy, as some messages are not being logged correctly due to this length limitation.

**Combined message\_id (use in XMPP Tracking)**:  
`5209f4ff-6d25-11f0-bee8-2e039dac106d-248067903Android248067903CPH2467638b677acbba4dee9fc04bc53c63ea70`   _(Length: more than 100 characters)_

**Individual Parts**: **(Received from Android Platform)**

`message id` : `5209f4ff-6d25-11f0-bee8-2e039dac106d-248067903` → _(Length: 46)_

`receiver_resourceid`: `Android-248067903CPH2467638b677a-cbba-4dee-9fc0-4bc53c63ea70` → _(Length: 63)_

  

  

### Request for Analysis

1.  Why is the combined message ID been exceeding 100 characters recently? Is there any change in the logic or generation of the resourceid or message\_id?
2.  What is the maximum possible length of the message id? What is the logic used to generate this ID?
3.  What is the maximum possible length of the receiver resourceid? What is the format or logic behind this ID?
bugs.author: Khem Chand

bugs.title: UI inconsistencies in More Filter screen(Webview) of lms listing screen compared to More Filters (native)
bugs.description: ### **Actual Behavior** **Spacing & Alignment** Option labels (e.g., _IndiaMART Direct_, _Foreign_) in WebView are too close to the preceding elements, leading to a visually cluttered layout. Native provides better padding and separation. **Borders / Visual Separation** In WebView, option boxes lack clear borders, making them appear merged into the background. Native shows distinct bordered boxes, improving readability and touch-target clarity. **Font Size Difference** The font size of options such as India,  Buylead ,calls _Direct_ and _Foreign_ is smaller in WebView compared to Native, reducing readability. **Overall Visual Hierarchy** Native filter screen provides better emphasis through padding, borders, and font sizing, while WebView appears less structured and harder to scan quickly. ### **Expected Behavior** WebView filter screen should maintain consistency with the Native design in terms of: Proper spacing and alignment of elements. Clear bordered boxes for filter options. Adequate and consistent font size for readability. Visual hierarchy similar to Native for better user experience ### **Steps to reproduce:** 1. Go to page X 2. Click on button Y 3. Select Foo ### **Test Environment**: 1. **Device:** Desktop/Mobile 2. **Environment**: Stage/Production: 3. **Operating System:**  Testing

### **Actual Behavior**

On first click of "Call" CTA from email, user is redirected to the phone dial pad.

After returning to the email and clicking on "Contact" or "IndiaMART" CTA, user is again redirected to the dial pad instead of opening the app and navigating to the Message Center

Please refer attached video in ticket

Mail \[MPLaunch@IM\] \[LMSHelp@IM\] A/B Test on Instant ASTBUY Buyer-side Emails – Image & CTA Enhancements

### **Expected Behavior**

On clicking "Call" CTA, user should be redirected to the phone dial pad (as expected).

On clicking "Contact" or "IndiaMART" CTA, user should be redirected to the app and land on the Message Center, not the dial pad.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  post bl >>wait for astbuy mail
2.  click on call CTA >land on dail pad
3.  come back to mail
4.  click on contact and  indiamart logo
5.  check the redirection

bugs.title: Invalid Gluser Creation Due to Incorrect IP Address in modId : Android API OTPVerification
bugs.description: While testing the `OTPVerification` API for ModID `android`, we encountered an issue where Gluser creation fails if an incorrect IP address is provided. The API returns an **“Invalid Gluser creation”** error, preventing the user from being created. This issue was observed consistently when passing a wrong IP address. The expected behavior is that the Gluser should be created successfully, or the API should return a clear message indicating the invalid IP. We are getting **0.0.0.0** this ip in request, here is the ss of input request : A screenshot illustrating the error is attached for reference.
bugs.author: Satyam Gupta

bugs.title: Invalid Phone Number Format in modId:  Android API OTPVerification – Must Be Mobile or Landline
bugs.description: While testing the `OTPVerification` API for ModID `android`, we observed that the API returns an error **“Phone number should be either mobile or landline”** when an invalid phone number format is provided. This prevents the OTP verification process from completing successfully. The expected behavior is that the API should either accept a valid mobile or landline number or provide a clear message indicating the correct format. we are getting input request as :  A screenshot illustrating the error is attached for reference. Here is the kibana link : [https://imkibanaindia.intermesh.net/app/r/s/A42A2](https://imkibanaindia.intermesh.net/app/r/s/A42A2)
bugs.author: Satyam Gupta

3.  **Operating System:** Android 12

bugs.title: Invalid Pincode Does Not Trigger Error Message – Loader Keeps Spinning
bugs.description: ### **Actual Behavior** When the user enters an invalid or incorrect pincode and submits, app displays a continuous loading spinner. The loader never stops, and no error message  is shown to the user. The user cannot proceed or retry without refreshing the page. ### **Expected Behavior** When the user enters an invalid pincode, it should display  error message (e.g., _“please enter  valid pincode.”_). The loader should stop after validation fails. ### **Steps to reproduce:** 1. login as buyer(160516037) , free seller(130356318) , paid seller(49320493) 2. click on hamburger menu 3. Click on pencil icon  4. in other information section try entering 000000 5. and observe the loader ### **Test Environment**: 1. **Device:** Mobile/Oppo A38/Redmi 8 2. **Environment**: Production: 3. **Operating System:** android 15 4. **Browser/Version:** 13.6.4 ### ### **User Type** User should be defined based on Indian  ### ###

bugs.title: Search history not syncing between this webapp version and desktop. Case 2: Mobile (this build) → Desktop
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

Search history is **not syncing** between the **current mobile app build** and **desktop**:

Searches done on **Desktop / other devices** are **not visible** in Search History on this build.

Searches done on **this build** are **not visible** in Search History on Desktop / other devices.

### **Expected Behavior**

Search history should be **account-level and synced** across:

Desktop

Other mobiles

This mobile build

Any search done on **any device** should appear in Search History on **all devices** for the same user.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

**Case 1: Desktop → Mobile (this build)**

1.  Log in with same account on **Desktop** and **Mobile (this build)**.
2.  On **Desktop**, search for 2–3 items (e.g., “CCTV camera”, “Rice bag”, “Inverter battery”).
3.  Confirm they appear in **Desktop Search History**.
4.  On **Mobile (this build)**, open **Search → Search History**.

**Actual:** Desktop searches do **not** appear in mobile history.

**Case 2: Mobile (this build) → Desktop**

1.  On **Mobile (this build)**, search for some items (e.g., “GI pipe”, “LED panel light”).
2.  Confirm they appear (if at all) in **Search History** on this build.
3.  Now open **Desktop**, same account.
4.  Go to **Search → Search History**.

**Actual:** Searches done on this build **do not appear** in Desktop history.

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Redmi note 9 pro max
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** Android 12
bugs.author: Sharan S

bugs.title: Ad is being shown on the Search Page.

bugs.title: OTP Verification Fails Due to GLID Mismatch Between OTPGen and OTPVer
bugs.description: In the Android OTP flow, the **GLID returned by the OTPGen API** is not the same GLID that is later sent to the **OTPVer API** for some users. Because of this mismatch, the OTPVer API responds with the error: **“Mobile number is not associated with user.”** I am attaching **screenshots of two cases** showing: 1.) GLID received from OTPGen API                 A different GLID being passed to OTPVer API                 This inconsistency results in failed OTP verification and needs to be fixed. Here is the kibana links -  OTPGen - [https://imkibanaindia.intermesh.net/app/r/s/E0WRW](https://imkibanaindia.intermesh.net/app/r/s/E0WRW) OTPVer - [https://imkibanaindia.intermesh.net/app/r/s/pieTn](https://imkibanaindia.intermesh.net/app/r/s/pieTn)
bugs.author: Satyam Gupta

It is also replicating for messages. If seller is on lms listing screen and recieves message from old buyer then along with above issue product name is also not shown on contact card.

For latest messages all the details are shown in real time.

Replicates only for first message/Enquiry from old buyer account (connection is already made and New enquiries.

All the details should always display on contact card in lms listing screen

1.  Login as paid seller

bugs.title: [App Dependent] Ask for Review option is displayed on the post-call popup for free sellers when a call is attempted from the Seller Dashboard message section widget.
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

Ask for Review option is displayed on the post-call popup when a call is attempted from the Seller Dashboard message section widget.

It is replicating for glid ending with 4 and 9 free sellers

### **Expected Behavior**

Ask for Review option should not displayed on the post-call popup when a call is attempted from the Seller Dashboard message section widget.

1.  Login as 1002520033
2.  Open Seller dashboard
3.  Go to message section
4.  click on call now cta shown on contact card
5.  check the post call popup UI

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System: Android 15**

bugs.title: IndiaMART Android App Unavailable for UK Buyers
bugs.description: Hi Team, We would like to highlight an issue impacting **UK-based buyers** who are unable to download the IndiaMART Android application. **Freshdesk Ticket ID:** 8671705 **Buyer Details & Verbatim:** GL ID: 258864948 Country : UK **Buyer Verbatim:** "I am unable to get your IndiaMart app in the uk so could you please advise how l can find out what is happening with the order l placed?  Also how is it best to contact you from UK. Thanks  Marjorie Johnson." ### Issue Identified The IndiaMART Android app is not available for download in the United Kingdom. The Google Play Store displays the message **“This item is not available in your country.”** Buyers who have already placed orders are therefore unable to track order status or access in-app support. Referred the Buyer Screenshot ​​ ### Journey UK-based buyer searches for the IndiaMART app on Google Play Store. Play Store displays the message: **“This item is not available in your country.”** Buyer is unable to download the app. We are currently not able to replicate this issue from our end using the VPN.
bugs.author: Ravindra Patel4

bugs.title: ANR on LIVE: Input dispatching timed out in PriorityThreadFactory.lambda$newThread$0
bugs.description:
## **Environment**

**App Package:** `com.indiamart.m`

**Module:** `com.indiamart.shared.PriorityThreadFactory`

**Release Stage:** Production

**Time Range:** Last 28 days

## **Impact**

**Affected Users:** 454

**ANR Events:** 475

**User-perceived:** Yes

**Trend:**

Users ↑ **2.48%** vs previous 28 days

Events ↑ **3.04%** vs previous 28 days

## **Issue Summary**

The app is triggering an **ANR due to input dispatch timeout**, indicating that the **main thread is blocked** for too long while handling user input.

The stack trace shows heavy background activity and thread contention originating from threads created via:

com.indiamart.shared.PriorityThreadFactory.lambda$newThread$0  
  

## **Observations from Thread Dump**

Large number of active background threads:

OkHttp (multiple hosts)

Firebase (Remote Config, Messaging, Crashlytics)

Smack (XMPP)

WebView / Chromium threads

Multiple threads created via **PriorityThreadFactory**

High thread contention and thread pool saturation

Main/UI thread likely blocked waiting for:

Network responses

Synchronous waits

Locks / thread pool availability

## **Suspected Root Causes**

**Blocking work indirectly affecting Main Thread**

Heavy network I/O and parsing

Synchronous waits on shared executors

**Unbounded or poorly managed thread creation**

PriorityThreadFactory creating too many threads

**Thread pool starvation**

Tasks queued but not executed promptly

**Main thread waiting on background results**

Possible `.get()`, `wait()`, `join()`, or synchronous callbacks

**High concurrent OkHttp / Smack / Firebase operations**

## **Steps to Reproduce**

_Not consistently reproducible locally_  
Observed in production under real-user load and network activity.

bugs.author: Jyoti IndiaMART

bugs.title: ANR: Input dispatching timed out due to thread pool saturation || android.os.MessageQueue.nativePollOnce
bugs.description:
## **Environment**

**App Package:** `com.indiamart.m`

**Issue Type:** ANR – Input dispatching timed out

**Native Method:** `android.os.MessageQueue.nativePollOnce`

**Release Stage:** Production

**Time Window:** Last 28 days

## **Impact**

**Affected Users:** 374 (**↑ 4.47%** vs previous period)

**ANR Events:** 440 (**↑ 9.18%** vs previous period)

**User-perceived:** Yes

  

## **Issue Summary**

The app is experiencing **Input Dispatch ANRs** where the **main thread is blocked**, preventing UI events from being processed within the system timeout window.

Although the main thread appears idle in `nativePollOnce`, the thread dump shows **extreme background thread contention and saturation**, particularly involving:

*   `PriorityThreadFactory`
*   Heavy SQLite write/delete operations
*   Multiple unbounded thread pools
*   SDK background work (MoEngage, Firebase, Ads, WebView, OkHttp)

This results in **resource starvation**, indirectly blocking the UI thread.

  

### **Thread Pool Explosion**

Hundreds of active threads:

*   Firebase (Crashlytics, Messaging, Sessions)
*   MoEngage
*   Ads SDKs
*   WebView / Chromium
*   OkHttp

Many threads waiting → indicates **pool starvation + oversubscription**

  

### **Thread Pool Explosion**

Hundreds of active threads:

Firebase (Crashlytics, Messaging, Sessions)

MoEngage

Ads SDKs

WebView / Chromium

OkHttp

Many threads waiting → indicates **pool starvation + oversubscription**
bugs.author: Jyoti IndiaMART

bugs.title: On every new login smiley rating pop-up is being shown every time in after consuming bl/after posting pbr/enquiry.
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

On every new login smiley rating pop-up is being shown every time in after consuming bl/after posting pbr/enquiry.

### **Expected Behavior**

**Smiley rating pop-up shouldn't be shown every time.**

### **Steps to reproduce:**

bugs.title: IM Insta seller is able to send messages via the Saved Reply screen, PDF quotation, Mini Catalog, and Post-Call popup even when the chatbox is locked.
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

IM Insta seller is able to send messages via the Saved Reply screen, PDF quotation, Mini Catalog, and Post-Call popup even when the chatbox is locked.

Seller is also able to ask for review via suggestive template/post call popup, share catalog link from mini catalog screen, Rate the buyer

When user send any type of messages from mentioned journeys chatbox gets unlocked and user can send any type message without any restriction.

Due to the above issue, the chatbox gets unlocked and remains unlocked until the buyer sends a new enquiry.

### **Expected Behavior**

User should not be able Perform following activity if the chatbox is locked :  
Click on text box.  
click on attachment icon    
send ask for review message from post call popup and suggestive templates.  
send pdf quotation   
Rate the buyer   
send catalog link from mini catalog   
send message from saved reply

share catalog link from mini catalog screen.

for freezing chatbox, the text reply will be locked till buyer replies, either through bmc or through whatsapp.

It will be unlocked only if buyer reply after connection is made or outbound template condition is not satisfied ( No exchange of message within 7 days)

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Login as paid seller
2.  Open conversation of any user where outboudn template condifiotn is satisfied.
3.  Send message from saved reply or post call popup after outbound template is sent.
4.  check the chatbox gets unlocked.
5.  User can send send all type of messages even before buyers reply.

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System: Android 15**
bugs.author: Shubham Panigrahi

bugs.title: Filters are applied successfully even when network is disconnected on More Filters screen
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

When user is on More Filters screen and network is disconnected, clicking "Apply Filters" successfully applies the filters. User is redirected to LMS Listings screen where a toast message is shown no internet is available . filter applied is shown but no filtetered lead is shown.

### **Expected Behavior**

When user is on More Filters screen with no network connection and clicks "Apply Filters", the system should display an error toast message (e.g., "No internet connection. Please check your network and try again") and NOT apply the filters or redirect to LMS Listings screen.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

*   Login as paid seller
*   Navigate to LMS Listings screen
*   Click on "More Filters" icon
*   Select any filter criteria (e.g., Order Value, Location)
*   Turn off device network (WiFi/Mobile data) OR enable Airplane mode
*   Click "Apply Filters" button
*   **Observe:** User is redirected to LMS Listings screen, toast shows "Filters applied successfully", and filtered results are displayed

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** Android 15

No flickering should occur on contact card in Seller Dashboard message section when user clicks "Call Now" CTA and navigates back from dialer, regardless of autoresponder status.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

*   Login as IM Insta seller
*   **Precondition:** Ensure autoresponder is enabled in settings
*   Navigate to Seller Dashboard
*   Scroll down to Message section
*   Locate a contact card with a last message displayed (third line)
*   Click on "Call Now" CTA on the contact card
*   **Observe:** Dialer opens with contact number
*   Press device back button or end call to return to Seller Dashboard
*   **Observe:** Last message text on contact card flickers/blinks for 1-2 seconds

bugs.title: Contact Company Name Widget Flickers and Changes to ‘Best Product Near You’ After Navigating Back from Enquiry Flow
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

When a user scrolls to 'contact company name' widget in products tab and selects a product and post enquiry, and upon navigating back from Requirement sent page, the widget becomes 'Best product name near you' with a get best price CTA. When the user again selects a product and clicks on the Get Best Price CTA, and then clicks on the Exit button, the Contact Company Name widget flickers momentarily before showing the Best Product Near You widget.

This is happening on every section of company page where 'contact company name' widget is present.

### **Expected Behavior**

The widget should not flicker, and the Contact Company Name widget should remain retained after navigating back from the enquiry flow.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Go to company page.
2.  Click on products tab.
3.  scroll to 'contact company name' widget
4.  post a enquiry
5.  navigate back and observe the change of widget.
6.  Again select a product and click on get best price CTA.
7.  navigate back without posting the enquiry and observe the flickering. 

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme GT2
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** Android 15

bugs.title: Duplicate messages appearing on LMS conversation screen after sending outbound template or autoresponder message — Intermittent
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

Duplicate messages are appearing on the LMS conversation screen in the following scenarios:

1.  When the seller clicks on any **outbound suggestive template** on the LMS conversation screen
2.  When the seller **opens the LMS conversation** after an **autoresponder message** is sent _(applicable when autoresponder toggle is ON)_

The issue also **replicates for attachment messages**. This bug is **intermittent** and occurs **mostly under slow network conditions.**

**It is working after reopening the conversation.**

### **Expected Behavior**

Each message should appear only **once** on the LMS conversation screen regardless of network speed. No duplicate messages should be shown after sending an outbound template, autoresponder message, or attachment.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

*   Login as an **IM Insta seller** with **autoresponder toggle ON**
*   Navigate to the **LMS conversation screen after BL purchase.**

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** Android 15
bugs.author: Shubham Panigrahi

bugs.title: Suggestive templates incorrectly shown on post purchase Buy Lead popup when outbound template already sent to same buyer
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

When a seller has already sent an **outbound template** to a buyer and then purchases another Buy Lead for the **same buyer** from the BL listing screen, the **post purchase Buy Lead popup still displays suggestive templates**. Since the outbound template can only be sent once per day and a connection between the buyer and seller already exists, displaying suggestive templates in this scenario is incorrect behavior.

### **Expected Behavior**

When the seller has already sent an outbound template to the same buyer, the post purchase Buy Lead popup should:

1.  **Not display suggestive templates**
2.  Show only **"Call Now"** and **"View Details"** CTAs
3.  Display an **informational message** such as _"Message already sent"_ to inform the seller that an outbound template has already been sent to this buyer today

### **Steps to reproduce:**

*   Login as a seller
*   Open the conversation of buyer send outbound template
*   Navigate back to the **BL listing screen**
*   Search for the **same buyer's Buy Lead** and purchase it 
*   Observe the **post purchase Buy Lead popup**
*   Observe — suggestive templates are still displayed even though outbound template was already sent today 

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System: Android 15**
bugs.author: Shubham Panigrahi

bugs.title: Emojis Converting to Hashcodes After Submitting Rating Review (Android App)
bugs.description: ### **Bug Title:** Emojis Converting to Hashcodes After Submitting Rating Review (Android App) ### **Actual Behavior:** When a user provides a rating and writes a review including emojis, upon submission: The emojis are converted into **hashcodes/special character codes** instead of displaying properly. In some cases, the emoji is also getting saved as a hashcode in the database. After refreshing the page or switching conversations, the emoji sometimes renders correctly again. This creates inconsistent behavior and indicates possible encoding or storage issues. ### **Expected Behavior:** Emojis entered in the review should remain properly displayed after submission. There should be no conversion of emojis into hashcodes at any stage (UI or DB level). ### **Steps to Reproduce:** Open the **Android app** Login with valid credentials Open any conversation Provide a rating In the review field, add emojis (e.g., 😊🔥👍) Submit the review Observe that emojis are converted to hashcodes Refresh the page or switch conversations Observe inconsistent rendering of emojis ### **Note:** A case has been observed where the emoji was saved as a hashcode in the database. ### **Test Environment**: 1. **Device:** Android app 2. Device Name : Realme 5i 3. **Environment**:  LIVE ### **User Type** User should be defined based on Indian or Foreign or Both ### **Bug Type** Specify the bug types: UI/UX, Functional/Logical, ### **Bug Source** Specify the bug sources: User Journey Testing

bugs.title: Wait for Buyer Reply" System Message Not Updating to "Buyer Read Your Message" in Real Time or on Conversation Reopen After Outbound Template is Sent
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

*   The "Wait for Buyer Reply" system message does not update to "Buyer Read Your Message" in real time after the buyer reads the message on WhatsApp.
*   Closing and reopening the conversation also does not refresh or update the status.
*   The status only changes after the buyer sends a reply message from WhatsApp, not on message read

### **Expected Behavior**

*   Once the buyer reads the outbound template message on WhatsApp, the system-generated "Wait for Buyer Reply" message should update to "Buyer Read Your Message" in real time without any additional action from the seller.
*   If not updated in real time, the status must at minimum reflect the correct read state when the seller closes and reopens the conversation.
*   The update should not be dependent on the buyer sending a reply message.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

*   Login as an IM Insta seller on the app.
*   Send an enquiry to the above seller 
*   An autoresponder message will be sent to the buyer automatically.
*   Open the conversation of the buyer from the seller's LMS conversation screen.
*   From the buyer's account, open WhatsApp and read the message sent by the seller (do not reply).
*   Switch back to the seller's app and observe the "Wait for Buyer Reply" system message status in the conversation.
*   Also close the conversation and reopen it to check if the status updates on reopen.

### **Test Environment:**

1.  **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** Android 15
bugs.author: Shubham Panigrahi

bugs.title: Rating Pop-up Not Opening After Clicking “Rate Now” CTA from AFR Notification (Android)
bugs.description: ### **Title:** Rating Pop-up Not Opening After Clicking “Rate Now” CTA from AFR Notification (Android) ### **Actual Behavior:** After triggering an AFR (Ask for Rating) from the seller account and logging into the buyer account on the Android app, the AFR notification is received. When the user clicks on the **“Rate Now”** CTA, it redirects to BMC (Buyer Message Center), but the **rating pop-up does not open**. ### **Expected Behavior:** When the user clicks on the **“Rate Now”** CTA from the AFR notification, it should: Redirect to the relevant BMC conversation. Automatically open the **rating pop-up** so the user can submit their rating. ### **Steps to Reproduce:** Login with a **seller account**. Trigger an **AFR (Ask for Rating)** to a buyer. Login with the same **buyer account** in the Android app. Check and open the **AFR notification**. Click on the **“Rate Now”** CTA. Observe that: User is redirected to **BMC**. Rating pop-up does **not** open. ### **Test Environment**: 1. **Device:** Android App 2. **Environment**: LIVE 3. **Operating System:** e.g. Centos 7 / Ubuntu 20.04/ Windows 10 Pro 4. **Browser/Version:** e.g. Google Chrome 89.0.4389.90 (64 bit) ### **User Type** User should be defined based on Indian or Foreign or Both ### **Bug Type** Specify the bug types: UI/UX, ### **Bug Source** Specify the bug sources: User Journey Testing

bugs.title: Search bar, hamburger menu icon, and context menu icon are not properly aligned in the BL (Buy Leads) page header
bugs.description: ### **Actual Behavior** The three elements — hamburger menu (☰), search bar (_Search BuyLeads/Tenders..._), and context menu (⋮) — appear **misaligned**. The icons and search bar are not sitting at the same vertical center within the header, resulting in a broken and inconsistent UI appearance. ### **Expected Behavior** The hamburger menu icon (☰), search bar, and context menu icon (⋮) should be **uniformly vertically centered** and horizontally aligned within the header toolbar, maintaining consistent spacing and height. ### **Steps to reproduce:** 1. Login as paid seller 2. Open BL listing screen 3. Check the UI of header ### **Test Environment**: 1. **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus 2. **Environment**: Stage 3. **Operating System:**  Android 15
bugs.author: Shubham Panigrahi

bugs.title: Lead title displays "Efc" in mixed case instead of correct abbreviation "EFC", causing text inconsistency across components on the same screen
bugs.description: ### **Actual Behavior** The abbreviation is rendered **differently across components on the same screen:** **** ### **Expected Behavior** The abbreviation **"EFC"** should be rendered consistently and correctly across **all components** — Lead Title, Buyer Viewed, and Similar Leads — preserving the original casing as received from the API. ### **Steps to reproduce:** * Launch IndiaMART Seller App * Log in with valid seller credentials * Navigate to **Buy Leads** from the bottom navigation bar * Search or scroll to find a lead containing **"EFC"** in the title (e.g., _Ramco Superfine EFC Cement_) * Observe the lead title in the **Lead Card header** * Scroll down and observe the same product name in the **"Buyer Viewed"** section * Scroll further and observe the title in the **"Similar Leads"** section ### **Test Environment**: 1. **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus 2. **Environment**: Stage 3. **Operating System:** Android 15
bugs.author: Shubham Panigrahi

bugs.title: "Submit" button in the Review modal has a rectangular shape, inconsistent with the app's standard pill-shaped button design pattern
bugs.description: ### **Actual Behavior** The "Submit" button is rendered with a **mildly rounded rectangle shape** (low `cornerRadius`), which visually stands out as inconsistent with the established pill-shaped button design language used throughout the app. ### **Expected Behavior** The "Submit" button should follow the app's **standard pill-shaped button design pattern** — fully rounded corners (high `cornerRadius`) — consistent with all other primary CTA buttons used across the app. ### **Steps to reproduce:** * Launch IndiaMART Seller App * Log in with valid seller credentials * Navigate to any **Buyer's chat/profile page** * Tap the **Review** option to open the "Review \[Buyer\]" modal * Observe the shape of the **"Submit" button** at the bottom of the modal * Compare it with other CTA buttons in the app (e.g., "Contact Buyer Now" on the BL page) ### **Test Environment**: 1. **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus 2. **Environment**: Stage 3. **Operating System:** Android 15

bugs.title: Duplicate OTP Generation & Verification During Primary Email Verification
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

 • During the email verification process, the system generates and verifies the OTP twice.  
• Users are required to complete OTP verification two times for a single email verification flow.  
• This creates unnecessary redundancy and impacts user experience.

### **Expected Behavior**

 • OTP should be generated only once during email verification.  
• User should be required to verify the OTP only once.  
• The verification flow should complete successfully after a single OTP validation.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

 1. Go to My Profile Page with primary email unverified   
2\. Click on verify CTA against the primary email id  
  

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Desktop / Mobile
2.  **Environment**: Production:
3.  **Operating System:** e.g. Centos 7 / Ubuntu 20.04/ Windows 10 Pro
4.  **Browser/Version:** e.g. Google Chrome 89.0.4389.90 (64 bit)

The column remains empty or unchanged after the template is sent. **Reproducibility:** 100% ### **Expected Behavior** On sending "Yes" or "No" outbound template from the post call popup, the corresponding keyword ("yes" or "no") should be appended in the `subref_text` column of `dir_query_reply` . ### **Steps to reproduce:** * Login as IM Insta seller * Purchase any BL * On the post call popup, click "Call Now" CTA * Send "Yes" or "No" outbound template * Check `subref_text` column in `dir_query_reply`  in the database * Observe that the keyword is not appended ### **Test Environment**: 1. **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus 2. **Environment**: Stage 3. **Operating System:**  Android 15

Correct rfq\_source\_id : 80 ### **Steps to reproduce:** * Login as IM Insta seller * Purchase any BL * On the post call popup, click "Call Now" CTA * Send "Yes" or "No" outbound template * Check rfq\_source\_id column in dir\_query\_reply in the database * Observe that incorrect RFQ source ID is saved ### **Test Environment**: 1. **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus 2. **Environment**: Stage 3. **Operating System:** Android 15

bugs.title: Concurrent OTP Requests Causing Redis Rate Limiting Inconsistency
bugs.description: ### **Actual Behavior** Hi Team, We have identified a few cases where OTP generation requests are being received simultaneously. This is impacting our rate-limiting mechanism. When multiple requests hit the system at the same time, they may read the same Redis counter value. Each request then updates the counter independently, resulting in missed increments and an incorrect final counter value. This leads to unexpected behavior under high concurrency. **1\.  Mobile Number:** 917488578147 Kibana Link: [https://imkibanaindia.intermesh.net/app/r/s/Mov5Q](https://imkibanaindia.intermesh.net/app/r/s/Mov5Q) **2\.  Mobile Number:** 918500192834 Kibana Link: [https://imkibanaindia.intermesh.net/app/r/s/8sAqB](https://imkibanaindia.intermesh.net/app/r/s/8sAqB) ## **Expected Behavior** Multiple OTP generation requests should not be triggered at the same time for the same user.
bugs.author: Shubhangi Rastogi

bugs.title: Introductory Message Not Sent with WhatsApp Message for Buyers Connected via PNS Success Call Against Product
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

Introductory message is not being sent along with WhatsApp message to buyers where connection is made via PNS success call against Product. It is working fine if connection is made by Enquiry, Failed PNS call or Buylead. Introductory message is being sent in all these cases. Replicating every time.

  

### **Expected Behavior**

Introductory message should be sent along with WhatsApp message to buyers where connection is made via PNS success call against Product. It was working fine on the last build.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

*   Login as 7349419
*   Open LMS conversation of a buyer where connection is made via PNS success call
*   Send catalog link to buyer from LMS conversation screen
*   Click on "Share on WhatsApp" CTA
*   Send the message to buyer's WhatsApp
*   Perform the same steps by sending a Product (relevant to mcat of PNS call enquiry) from mini catalog or share product widget (Note: Introductory message will be sent only if product mcat matches with mcat of received call enquiry product)
*   Verify that only normal WhatsApp message is being sent to buyer in both above scenarios

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System: Android 15**

### **Expected Behavior**

After deselecting a city and returning to the search results page, the search query should remain unchanged and display normally with spaces between words. No additional ‘+’ characters should be added to the query.

3.  Apply a city filter from the filters section.

bugs.title: Unable to upload photos via camera in Suggested Product popup on Android 15
bugs.description: ### **Actual Behavior** When a paid seller adds a product name and price in the Suggested Product popup and attempts to upload a product photo using the device camera, the app displays a blank white screen after the photo is captured and confirmed. The entire app becomes unresponsive on this blank screen, and the user is forced to relaunch the application to continue using it. No image is uploaded or previewed. This issue is reproducible consistently on Android 15. ### **Expected Behaviour:** * After capturing and confirming the photo, the captured image should appear as a **preview/thumbnail** on the product card within the Suggested Product popup * The user should be able to **proceed with saving** the product or continue editing without any disruption**.** ### **Steps to reproduce:** * Login with a paid seller account * Navigate to **Buyleads → LMS** * Wait for the **Suggested Product popup** to appear * Enter a valid **product name** and **price** * Tap the **Add Photo** icon on the product card * Select **Camera** from the upload options * Capture a photo using the device camera * Tap **Save / ✓ (tick icon)** to confirm the photo * Observe the screen after confirmation ### **Test Environment**: 1. **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus 2. **Environment**: Stage/ 3. **Operating System:** Android 15
bugs.author: Shubham Panigrahi

bugs.title: Incorrect product result is shown for a specific product search via photo search from the share icon present in the gallery
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

When a user opens a **Casio watch photo** from their device gallery, taps the **Share icon**, and selects **IndiaMART Lens** as the share target, the Lens search result screen displays an incorrect product — a **computer mouse** — instead of watch-related results. This indicates the Lens image recognition is misidentifying the product category for this specific image type.

Out of around 20-25 product result only 1 wrong result is shown and it is shown at top in search result. 

working fine for other product photo search.

### **Expected Behavior**

*   IndiaMART Lens should display **watch / Casio watch related products** for a Casio watch image
*   Image recognition should identify the correct product category and return relevant results

### **Steps to reproduce:**

*   Open the **device Gallery**
*   Open any **Casio watch photo**
*   Tap the **Share icon**
*   Select **Lens** from the share options
*   IndiaMART Lens screen opens with search results
*   Observe the product result displayed

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme 10 prop lus
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** Android 15
bugs.author: Shubham Panigrahi

bugs.title: White screen appears for ~1 second before loader on clicking Bell icon from Seller/Buyer Dashboard
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

When a seller or buyer taps the **Bell icon** from the dashboard, a **white/blank screen appears for approximately 1 second** before the loader is displayed and the Notification Center WebView loads. No smooth transition or branded loader is shown during this delay. This is consistent across both first and subsequent launches of the Notification Center and suggests the WebView is not being preloaded or cached after the initial visit.

### **Expected Behavior**

No while screen should appear. on clicking bell icon notificatio ncetre webview screen shoul appear immediately or the loadeer should display if the network is slow.

page should load witihng 1 sec in subsequent launch . and within 2 sec in the first launch after login

### **Steps to reproduce:**

**Scenario 1 — Seller Dashboard:**

1.  Login as a **paid/free seller**
2.  Tap the **Bell icon** from the Seller Dashboard
3.  Observe the screen behavior before the Notification Center loads

**Scenario 2 — Buyer Dashboard:**

1.  Switch to **Buyer Dashboard**
2.  Tap the **Bell icon**
3.  Observe the screen behavior before the Notification Center loads

**Subsequent Launch Check:**

1.  Navigate back to the dashboard
2.  Tap the **Bell icon** again
3.  Observe whether the white screen delay repeats

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** Android 15
bugs.author: Shubham Panigrahi

bugs.title: On clicking the "How to Edit Photo" and "How to Add Products" CTAs, a loading screen appears for 1 second.

bugs.title: Extra blank space appearing between Header & "Today" title, and between "Today" cards & "Older" title
bugs.description: ### **Actual Behavior** * **Issue 1:** An unexpected **extra blank space** is visible between the Notification Center header and the **"Today"** section title * **Issue 2:** An unexpected **extra blank space** is visible between the last notification card in the **"Today"** section and the **"Older"** section title * Both issues give the screen an inconsistent, broken layout appearance ### **Expected Behavior** * The **"Today"** title should appear directly below the Notification Center header with standard, consistent spacing — no extra blank space * The **"Older"** title should appear directly below the last "Today" notification card with standard, consistent spacing — no extra blank space * Overall layout should appear clean and uniform throughout the WebView screen ### **Steps to reproduce:** 1. Login as free or paid seller 2. Click on notification bell icon 3. Check the UI of notification center webview screen. 4. Check the Extra blank shown between header and "Today" title. ### **Test Environment**: 1. **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus 2. **Environment**: Stage 3. **Operating System:** Android 15
bugs.author: Shubham Panigrahi

bugs.title: After a payment failure via UPI, when the device back button is pressed, an unexpected error popup appears on the payment page.
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

When a free seller initiates a subscription purchase via the Monthly Payment Banner on the Buylead listing screen, selects UPI as the payment method, and the payment fails due to a wrong PIN, pressing the **Back CTA** after dismissing the failure toast triggers an **"Unexpected Error" popup** on the payment screen. The back navigation behavior is also broken — requiring **two back presses** to exit, landing on Premium Services screen first, then Buylead — instead of directly returning to Buylead with a payment failure message.

### **Expected Behavior**

*   After a UPI payment failure, pressing Back should either:
    *   **Option A:** Return to Payment screen → then Buylead listing on second back press, OR
    *   **Option B:** Directly navigate to **Buylead listing screen** with a **payment failure popup/toast**
*   **No "Unexpected Error" popup** should appear at any point in this back navigation flow

### **Steps to reproduce:**

*   Login with a **free seller** account
*   Open **Buylead listing screen**
*   Scroll down to at least **3 BL cards**
*   Verify the **Monthly Payment Banner** is visible
*   Tap **Buy Now** on the banner
*   On the Payment screen, select **UPI** as the payment option
*   Select a bank from the UPI app list
*   Enter an **incorrect UPI PIN** to intentionally fail the payment
*   Wait for the **payment failure toast** to appear, then tap **Dismiss**
*   On the Payment screen, tap the **Back CTA (←)**
*   Observe the screen behavior

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  Operating System: Android 15
bugs.author: Shubham Panigrahi

bugs.title: LMS Listing — Previous filter results still displayed after switching Activity Date to Lead Date from upfront filter when Date filter was also applied via More Filters
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

*   The Date filter chip gets removed from the UI (filter resets) — this is expected since the date context changed.
*   The Activity Date chip changes to Lead Date — this is also expected.
*   However, the listing still displays results based on the previously applied filters (Date + Activity Date). The leads do not refresh to reflect the reset.
*   The listing only corrects itself when the user manually refreshes the page.

### **Expected Behavior**

When switching from Activity Date to Lead Date on the upfront filter, if the Date filter resets and gets removed, the listing should also refresh and display leads based on the current active filters only (Lead Date without any date range), not the stale previous filter combination.

**Note:** If only Lead Date is applied from More Filters (without Date filter), the upfront filter reflects it correctly. The issue occurs specifically when a Date filter is also applied alongside Activity Date.

**Ref Ticket:** 647650

### **Steps to reproduce:**

*   Login as a paid seller
*   Open LMS listing screen
*   Open More Filter screen
*   Apply Date filter (select Month/Year) and set filter type to Activity Date
*   Apply filters and return to LMS listing screen
*   From the upfront filter on LMS listing, switch Activity Date to Lead Date

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** Android 15
bugs.author: Shubham Panigrahi

bugs.title: PNS numbers not displayed in real-time on PNS Settings screen
bugs.description: ### **Actual Behavior** When a user opens the PNS Settings screen for the first time, or adds a new PNS number, the list of PNS numbers does not render immediately. The numbers only appear after the user exits and reopens the screen. This is an intermittent issue with a reproduction rate of **3 out of 5 attempts**. ### ### **Expected Behavior** All existing and newly added PNS numbers should be displayed immediately on the PNS Settings screen without requiring the user to reopen it. ### **Steps to reproduce:** **Scenario 1 — Initial screen load:** 1. Login with account `7349419` 2. Navigate to PNS Settings screen 3. **Observe:** No PNS numbers are displayed 4. Close and reopen PNS Settings screen 5. **Observe:** All PNS numbers now appear correctly **Scenario 2 — After adding a new PNS number:** 1. Login with account `7349419` 2. Navigate to PNS Settings screen 3. Tap **Add Number** 4. Enter a valid landline or mobile number as the PNS number 5. Tap **Submit** 6. **Observe:** Newly added number and existing PNS numbers are not visible in real time 7. Close and reopen PNS Settings screen 8. **Observe:** All numbers (including newly added) are now shown correctly ### **Test Environment**: 1. **Device:** Realme 10 pro plus 2. **Environment**: Stage 3. **Operating System: Android 15**

bugs.title: Vulnerability Found -  Missing Rate Limiting on API Endpoints on app.indiamart.com
bugs.description: Hi team, While doing the security assessment of the app.indiamart.com (Ref. ticket- [https://project.intermesh.net/projects/cs/work\_packages/651320/activity),](https://project.intermesh.net/projects/cs/work_packages/651320/activity),) we have observed the  **Vulnerability Description -** The application does not enforce rate limiting on API endpoints. Multiple rapid requests were sent to endpoints such as /api/productajax/flips/account without any restriction or throttling. Sending 300 consecutive requests in rapid succession all received successful responses with no indication of throttling. _Screenshot Attached_ **Impact -** ➢ Allows denial-of-service (DoS) through request flooding without any restriction ➢ Facilitates automated enumeration of user accounts, OTP codes, or application data ➢ Risk of resource exhaustion on the server impacting availability for all users **Mitigation -** 1. Implement rate limiting on all API endpoints to restrict the number of requests a user can send within a specific time period. 2. Block or temporarily restrict users/IPs that send too many requests in a short time. 3. Return proper error responses (e.g., HTTP 429 – Too Many Requests) when the limit is exceeded.
bugs.author: Aman Pawar

bugs.title: Vulnerability Found -  Information Disclosure – Server Info in Response Headers on app.indiamart.com
bugs.description: Hi team, While doing the security assessment of the app.indiamart.com (Ref. ticket- [https://project.intermesh.net/projects/cs/work\_packages/651320/activity](https://project.intermesh.net/projects/cs/work_packages/651320/activity) ) we have observed the  **Vulnerability Description -** The application discloses server information through HTTP response headers. The Server header reveals the underlying web server software (nginx) and the Server-Name header exposes an internal service name (buyleads). This information can assist attackers in identifying the technology stack and crafting targeted attacks. _Screenshot Attached_ **Impact -** ➢ Enables targeted attacks based on known server software vulnerabilities ➢ Assists attackers in reconnaissance and technology fingerprinting ➢ Exposure of internal service/component names aids further enumeration ### **Mitigation Steps** 1. Hide server details in HTTP response headers to prevent exposure of backend technology. 2. Disable or mask the `Server` header so it does not reveal the web server information (e.g., nginx version). 3. Remove unnecessary headers such as `Server-Name` that expose internal service or component names.
bugs.author: Aman Pawar

bugs.title: Correct mobile number for Whatsapp, for PNS contacts

bugs.title: Back Arrow CTA Not Working on App Share Page Opened from Hamburger Menu

### **Actual Behavior**

### **Expected Behavior**

Clicking the back arrow CTA should navigate the user to the previous screen

### **Steps to reproduce:**

2.  Tap on the Hamburger Menu
3.  Navigate to App Share page

bugs.title: Blank Space Displayed in Related Categories Section in PDP When Recommended Products Are Less Than 10
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

On the Product Detail Page (PDP), within the Related Categories  section, if a product has fewer than the expected number of recommended products  (less than 10), the remaining space is left blank, creating an incomplete UI layout.

### **Expected Behavior**

The section should dynamically adjust based on the number of available products and No empty or blank spaces should be visible

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Search for natural LOT Rubber
2.  Open a Product Detail Page (PDP)
3.  Scroll to the Related Categories section
4.  Observe the UI layout

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme GT2
2.  **Operating System:** Android 15
bugs.author: Abhradeep Kanrar

bugs.title: Unit Not Displayed for Product Price in Ads PDP Homepage Section
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

In the Ads PDP Homepage section, product prices are displayed without unit (e.g., per piece, per kg) 

### **Expected Behavior**

Product price should always include the unit

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Navigate to ADS pdp page(jute bags)
2.  perform some action like sending enquiry
3.  click back CTA
4.  observe unit is not mentioned

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme GT2
2.  **Operating System:** Android 15
bugs.author: Abhradeep Kanrar

bugs.title: Incorrect CTA Flicker Observed After Tab Switch on Company Page Post Enquiry
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

After sending an enquiry using “Get Best Price” from the Products tab on the Company Page, when the user switches to another tab and comes back to the Products tab, the “Call Now” and “Get Best Price” CTAs are briefly visible for around 1 second before being replaced by the Extended Call CTA.

### **Expected Behavior**

Once an enquiry is sent, the Extended Call CTA should be displayed immediately when returning to the Products tab without showing any intermediate or incorrect CTAs, and the UI should remain consistent without flicker.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Open a Company Page
2.  Navigate to the Products tab
3.  Click on “Get Best Price” and send an enquiry
4.  Switch to another tab (e.g., About / Reviews)
5.  Return to the Products tab
6.  Observe the CTA behavior

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme GT2
2.  **Operating System:** Android 15
bugs.author: Abhradeep Kanrar

bugs.title: Previous Search Keyword Persists in Photo Search After Performing New Search and Navigating Back
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

In Photo Search, when a user uploads an image and gets results, then performs another search using the search bar on the Photo Search results page, and presses back, the previously searched keyword remains visible instead of showing the expected previous keyword.

### **Expected Behavior**

After navigating back, the search bar should show the previously searched keyword.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Open Photo Search
2.  Upload an image and view results
3.  Use the search bar to search for another product
4.  Press the back button
5.  Observe the search bar content

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme GT2
2.  **Operating System:** Android 15
bugs.author: Abhradeep Kanrar

bugs.title: Loader Persists When Posting Enquiry or PBR After Internet is Turned Off and On
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

When a user tries to post an enquiry while the internet is OFF, a loader appears and keeps loading. After turning the internet ON and attempting to post the enquiry or PBR again, the loader continues to persist and does not stop, preventing further interaction.

### **Expected Behavior**

After the internet is turned ON, the user should be able to successfully post the enquiry/PBR, and the loader should not be shown.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Open the IndiaMART Android app.
2.  Navigate to any product page.
3.  Tap on Get Best Price / Send Enquiry / PBR.
4.  Turn OFF internet connection on the device.
5.  Attempt to submit the enquiry.
6.  Observe that a loader appears and keeps loading.
7.  Turn the internet ON.
8.  Try to post enquiry/PBR again.
9.  Notice that the loader still persists

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Realme GT2
2.  **Operating System:** Android 15
bugs.author: Abhradeep Kanrar

equesting to send the **position\_flag** to the InsertSendReply API,the same flag will be received from the Suggestive reply API output payload.  
Flag from the Suggestive reply API:**pos\_flag**  
Flag to be sent to InsertSendReply API:**suggestive\_reply\_position**

bugs.author: Manish Murali

bugs.title: Suggestion popup closes after partial input; no visual guidance or confirmation before auto-dismissal
bugs.description: ### **Actual Behavior** After adding a new product, a dialog recommending 3 related products appeared (good feature). When I added the **title** and **price** for one of the suggested products, the **CTA (submit button)** became disabled without any message explaining what’s missing. Upon uploading an image, the entire dialog **closed automatically**, even though I was still in the middle of editing the suggested entries. ### **Expected Behavior** There should be a clear message indicating **why CTA is disabled** (e.g., “Please add image to continue”). The popup/dialog should **not close automatically** unless all mandatory product fields are filled and a final confirmation is given. If only partial data is entered for the suggested products, the system should ask: _“Do you want to save this product draft or discard it?”_ At the very least, there should be a **visual cue** indicating the action taken when the dialog closes. ### **Steps to reproduce:** Add a new product from the seller panel On the confirmation screen, notice the 3 recommended products Try to add title and price for any of the suggested products Observe: CTA gets disabled, no reason shown Try uploading an image Observe: The entire dialog closes without confirmation or warning ### **Test Environment:** ### **Logs:** Console Errors: Not available Backend: Possibly relevant for tracking why CTA is blocked Crash Report: No crash, but unexpected UI closure ### **User Type:** **Company**: Global Lift Private Limited (Test) **Group**: ExportTS **GL User ID**: 10359580 ### **Bug Type:** UX Functional ### **Bug Source:** User Journey Testing

bugs.title: No Visual Cue for Minimum Character Requirement in Product Description Field
bugs.description: ### **Actual Behavior:** During product enrichment, the **description score improves when the character count exceeds 100**, but there is **no indication or hint** to the user about this requirement. Users are left **guessing** how long the description should be to improve their product score. ### **Expected Behavior:** There should be a **character counter** or a hint like: _"Add at least 100 characters to improve your description score."_ Once the user crosses the minimum threshold, the UI should **visually confirm** the improvement (e.g., tick mark, score bar update, color change). ### **Steps to Reproduce:** Go to **Manage Products** Click on a product with **low enrichment score** Go to the **description field** Start adding content Notice: No **character counter** No **hint on minimum requirement** Score only updates **silently** after 100+ characters ### **Test Environment:** ### **Logs:** Not applicable – UX feedback issue ### **User Type:** **Company**: Global Lift Private Limited (Test) **Group**: ExportTS **GL User ID**: 10359580 ### **Bug Type:** UX / Usability Functional Hint Missing ### **Bug Source:** Product Enrichment Journey Testing
bugs.author: Jain Akshat

bugs.title: 'Continue' CTA missing while adding multiple products after filling name and price
bugs.description: ### **Actual Behavior:** While using the **multiple product addition** flow, I entered the **name and price** for 2 products. However, after filling these details, there was **no visible 'Continue' or 'Next' CTA** to proceed further with the submission. The page appears incomplete or unresponsive, leaving the user stuck without a clear path forward. ### **Expected Behavior:** After filling for products, the **'Continue' CTA** should become visible and active. There should be a clear indication that the user can proceed, or a prompt to fill in remaining mandatory fields. ### **Steps to Reproduce:** Go to **Manage Products > Add Multiple Products** Enter **Product Name** and **Price** for at least 2 products Look for **‘Continue’ CTA** to proceed Observe: No visible button or message appears ### **Test Environment:** ### **Logs:** No visible frontend errors Needs inspection of DOM/JS if CTA is hidden due to validation logic or view overflow ### **User Type:** **Company**: Global Lift Private Limited (Test) **Group**: ExportTS **GL User ID**: 10359580 ### **Bug Type:** Functional UI/UX (CTA visibility, navigation) ### **Bug Source:** App crash day Testing

bugs.title: [Photo Zoom] Duplicate Screen on Back Navigation After Viewing Product Image in Enquiry Card
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

An unnecessary intermediate screen appears after closing the image view, requiring two back presses to return to the conversation.

### **Expected Behavior**

After viewing the product image and pressing back, the user should be taken directly back to the conversation screen, not to another duplicate image screen.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

*   Log in to the seller account and open a buyer enquiry message that contains a product image.
*   Click on the product image in the enquiry card.
*   Image opens in full-screen as expected.
*   Now press the back button once.
*   Observe that another screen opens again showing the same product image.
*   Press the back button again — only now are you returned to the conversation screen. Mobile number used : 8335017702

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:**Mobile
2.  **Environment**:Live:
3.  **Operating System:** e.g. iPhone 13
4.  **Browser/Version:** e.g. Google Chrome 89.0.4389.90 (64 bit)

bugs.title: Ship with IM displaying for foreign users
bugs.description: ### **Actual Behavior** The "Ship with IndiaMART" feature is a logistics service available only to Indian buyers and suppliers. However, it is visible in the left menu for foreign buyers, who are not eligible to access or use this service. This creates confusion and a poor user experience for foreign users, as it implies availability of a service they cannot use. The option should be conditionally hidden based on the user’s country or buyer type. ### **Expected Behavior** The “Ship with IndiaMART” option should not be shown for foreign buyers. ### **Steps to reproduce:** 1. Launch the IndiaMART app. 2. Log in using a foreign buyer account. 3. Tap the hamburger (left) menu. 4. bugs.title: (Test server) BMC chat screen gets stuck after editing old ratings, user unable to navigate back to chat
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

When the user edits a 2–3 days old rating on the BMC chat screen, updates the star rating, adds a comment, submits it, and then clicks on cross icon, the updated rating stars display on the BMC chat screen. When the user clicks the back arrow again, the same screen reloads and the app gets stuck — the user is unable to navigate back to the main chat screen.

### **Expected Behavior**

Post clicking on back arrow, The user should be navigated back to the main BMC chat screen smoothly.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Login as buyer/ free seller
2.  Open the BMC chat screen with an existing rating (2–3 days old).
3.  Click to edit the rating.
4.  Update the star rating and add a comment.
5.  Submit the updated rating.
6.  Click on cross icon — the updated rating stars display.
7.  Click the back arrow again.

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** iphone13
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** ios 18.5

bugs.description:

Transaction data fails to load on first attempt - Loader is seen for some time and then no transaction data message is displayed, upon refreshing transaction data is displayed.

### **Expected Behavior**

Transaction data should be loaded on first attempt itself.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Login as seller(BL Webview enabled)
2.  Navigate to BL listing.
3.  Open Hamburger menu.
4.  Click on Transaction History.
5.  Loader is seen for some time and then no transaction data message is displayed.
6.  Click on refresh CTA.
7.  Transaction data is now displayed.

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** iPhone SE
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** iOS 18.5

Screen should not be stuck and Continue CTA should be visible properly

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  login on app
2.  go to any buyer webview company page>> About Us
3.  clicks on contact seller
4.  clicks on Select product dropdown and scroll the product
5.  observe that when user scroll up , screen stuck and **Continue** CTA disappear

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** iphone13
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** ios 18.5
bugs.author: Anjali Patel

bugs.title: Location permission repeatedly shown on clicking “Detect My Location” on Buyer Dashboard  || Intermittent issue
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

User clicks on detect my location on buyer webview  pages and set location. Now again when a user clicks on the **“Detect My Location”** option from the **Buyer Dashboard**, the app repeatedly prompts for **location permission**, even if the user has already granted it.

### **Expected Behavior**

Once location permission is granted, the app should detect the location and not ask for the same permission again.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Open the IndiaMART app.
2.  go to buyer webview pages
3.  clicks on Detect my location and allow permission and set location
4.  Now Go to the **Buyer Dashboard**.
5.  observe that location not updated on buyer dashboard
6.  Click on **“Detect My Location”**.
7.  Observe the behavior — the permission prompt reappears again

### **Test Environment:**

1.  **Device:** iphone13
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** ios 18.5
bugs.author: Anjali Patel

bugs.title: Error message shown when user clicks on product from Favourites page
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

When a user clicks on any **product** from the **Favourites page**, the app displays an error message:  
**“Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist.”**  
Instead of navigating to the **PDP**, the app fails to load the product, breaking the saved product journey.

### **Expected Behavior**

Tapping a product should redirect the user to the valid **PDP,** if product not available then it should auto removed from favourites screen

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Open the IndiaMART app. (glid-  "1" ,"3", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9")
2.  Go to the **Favourites** or **Saved** section from the menu.
3.  Click on any saved product in the list.
4.  Observe the response.

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** iphone13
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System:** ios 18.5
bugs.author: Anjali Patel

bugs.title: Whatsapp enquiry is not seen on the real time in the chat screen as well on the BMC listing of the Buyer..
bugs.description:
### **Actual Behavior**

Whatsapp enquiry is not seen on the real time in the chat screen of the Buyer in the BMC.  
There is a delay in the WhatsApp enquiry when the Buyer's number is the same as the WhatsApp number.  
There is a delay of approx 4 to 5 min to reflect in the buyer side bmc.  
Example- Enquiry is sent in the 11.54  and it is seen in db also but it was reflected on the 11.58 in the Buyer side.

### **Expected Behavior**

Whatsapp enquiry sent should be seen on the Buyer side on the real time.

### **Steps to reproduce:**

1.  Login from the Buyer
2.  Buyer account should have a WhatsApp number
3.  Now sent a WhatsApp enquiry to any seller
4.  Now move to BMC check the enquiry sent to the seller
5.  No new message or chat is seen for the enquiry
6.  Enquiry is approved in the dir\_query table 
7.  It is seen after 4 to 5 min in the Buyer side

### **Test Environment**:

1.  **Device:** Iphone 13
2.  **Environment**: Stage
3.  **Operating System: IOS 18.5**
bugs.author: Aditya Rai

1.  \*Device:\*\*Mobile
2.  **Environment**: Production:
3.  Device: iPhone12
4.  **Browser: Safari**

**Additional Notes:**

On the Photosearch side, the following code is being used:  
if (window.webkit && window.webkit.messageHandlers && window.webkit.messageHandlers.iosPhotoSearch) {  
 window.webkit.messageHandlers.iosPhotoSearch.postMessage(mcatExUrl);  
}  
Requesting the iOS team to verify if this handler is being triggered correctly for the **Mcat suggestion click events**.
